narrative.headline: 2018 Chevrolet Cruze: engine and transmission top owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 108 owner complaints to NHTSA, engine problems lead at 27 reports (25%), followed by power train issues at 23 (21%) — owners describe stalling and rough, jerky shifting. Service brakes stand out for safety: only 13 reports (12%), but 7 of them involved a crash, the most of any category. Engine reports include 2 fires.

issues.sample: I WAS LEAVING WORK ON 11-30-18 @ 5P.M. STARTED DRIVING DOWN LA HARPE BLVD, LIKE I DO EVERYDAY AFTER WORK. IT WAS RAINING THAT AFTERNOON WHEN I WAS LEAVING WORK. I WENT THROUGH A SMALL PUDDLE OF WATER AND MY CAR COMPLETELY SHUTDOWN AND WOULD NOT GO ANYWHERE. I HAD IT TOWED TO CRAI
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Most-reported area: 27 complaints (25%), including 2 fires, 1 crash, and 1 injury. Owners describe the car suddenly shutting down while driving.

issues.sample: MY CAR WILL NOT ACCELERATE AT TIMES CAUSING ME TO GIVE IT MORE GAS WHICH THEN CAUSE THE CAR TO REV UP TO A HIGH RPM   (4000-5000) AND THEN LURCH FORWARD. ALSO, AT TIMES WHILE TRYING TO MAINTAIN SPEED, MY CAR WILL JERK BACK AND FORTH UNTIL I GIVE IT MORE GAS SO IT UP SHIFTS. MY CA
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Second most-reported: 23 complaints (21%), with 3 crashes and 3 injuries. Owners report hesitation on acceleration and the car jerking or lurching between gears.

issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING ON THE INTERSTATE AT 60MPH, WITHOUT WARNING THE ENGINE TURNED OFF. THE DASH WENT COMPLETELY DARK. NO POWER, NO STEERING. DRIFTED TO SHOULDER. PUT IN PARK, TURNED KEY TO OFF THEN ON. VEHICLE STARTED. (NO WARNING OR SERVICE CODES) REPLICATED AGAIN ABOUT 10 MINS LATER.
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 14 complaints (13%), including 1 crash. Owners report the dash going dark and the engine cutting out without warning while driving.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 13 complaints (12%) but the biggest crash risk here: 7 of them involved a crash, plus 1 fire. Owners report the car failing to stop in time.

issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING ON THE INTERSTATE AT 60MPH, WITHOUT WARNING THE ENGINE TURNED OFF. THE DASH WENT COMPLETELY DARK. NO POWER, NO STEERING. DRIFTED TO SHOULDER. PUT IN PARK, TURNED KEY TO OFF THEN ON. VEHICLE STARTED. (NO WARNING OR SERVICE CODES) REPLICATED AGAIN ABOUT 10 MINS LATER.
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: 9 complaints (8%), with 2 crashes and 2 injuries. Owners report loss of steering after a sudden power or engine loss while driving.
